item.title: 🇸🇦🇦🇪 Gulf States Edge Closer to Direct Confrontation with Iran
item.description: Saudi Arabia and UAE have conducted military strikes inside Iran in retaliation for Iranian attacks, marking a shift from proxy conflicts to direct engagement. Kuwait also arrested IRGC members plotting attacks on Bubiyan Island.

item.title: 🇱🇧🇮🇱 Israel and Lebanon Extend Ceasefire by 45 Days
item.description: The US-brokered ceasefire between Israel and Hezbollah has been extended by 45 days following Washington talks. Israel carried out fresh strikes even as the extension was announced.

item.title: 🦠 Ebola Outbreak Confirmed in Congo with 65 Deaths
item.description: Africa CDC confirmed a new Ebola outbreak in DR Congo's Ituri province with 246 suspected cases and 65 deaths. The US CDC is monitoring the outbreak and providing technical assistance to both DRC and Uganda.

item.title: 🇺🇸 Pentagon Halts Troop Deployments to Poland and Germany
item.description: The Pentagon is drawing down thousands of troops in Europe by canceling planned deployments to Poland and Germany. The move has drawn bipartisan criticism from US lawmakers concerned about signaling weakness to Russia.

item.title: 🇺🇸 Trump Says Patience With Iran Running Out After Xi Summit
item.description: President Trump said his patience with Iran is running out after concluding talks with China's Xi Jinping. Trump said Xi agreed Iran cannot have nuclear weapons and must reopen the Strait of Hormuz, though China gave no indication it would intervene militarily.

item.title: 🇺🇸🇨🇳 Trump-Xi Summit Ends With Trade Deals But No Major Breakthroughs
item.description: President Trump concluded his Beijing summit with Chinese leader Xi Jinping, touting "fantastic trade deals" including Chinese purchases of U.S. oil, but experts say the agreements lack substance and major issues like Taiwan and Iran remain unresolved.

item.title: 🇺🇸 US Army Creates Multi-Domain Command-Pacific to Counter China Threats
item.description: The US Army is merging the 7th Infantry Division and 1st Multi-Domain Task Force into a new two-star command for the Indo-Pacific. The command will integrate long-range strike, cyber, electronic warfare, and intelligence capabilities across the region.

item.title: 🇨🇳 Xi Jinping to Make First US State Visit in Over a Decade This Autumn
item.description: Chinese Foreign Minister Wang Yi confirmed Xi Jinping will visit the US at Trump's invitation this autumn. Trump said the leaders could meet three more times this year, including at APEC in Shenzhen and G20 in Miami.

item.title: 🇺🇸 Pentagon draws down thousands of troops in Europe
item.description: The Pentagon is reducing US troop levels in Europe by canceling planned deployments to Poland and Germany rather than withdrawing existing forces, according to AP sources. The move comes as the Trump administration reassesses America's military footprint abroad.

item.title: 🛢️ Oil prices surge over 3% as US-Iran standoff persists
item.description: Oil prices jumped more than 3% as comments from President Trump and Iran's foreign minister dented hopes for a deal to end ship attacks and seizures around the Strait of Hormuz. UAE stocks also fell as the deadlock rattled regional markets.

item.title: 🇻🇪 Venezuela launches massive sovereign debt restructuring
item.description: Venezuela began a comprehensive public debt restructuring, one of the largest and most complex sovereign reworks on record. The country still faces major hurdles to complete the process after years of economic crisis and sanctions.

item.title: 🇮🇱⚔️ Israel Strikes Hamas Armed Wing Chief in Gaza
item.description: Israeli airstrikes killed at least seven Palestinians in Gaza. Israel said the strikes targeted the head of Hamas armed wing, though it was unclear if he was killed or wounded.

item.title: 🇩🇪🇺🇸 Merz: Would Advise Children Against Living in US
item.description: German Chancellor Friedrich Merz said he would advise his children against living or studying in the United States, citing a rapidly changing social climate and limited opportunities even for the highly educated.

item.title: 🇺🇦🇧🇾 Zelenskiy: Russia Planning Attack on NATO From Belarus
item.description: Ukraines president warned Russia may be preparing attacks on Ukraine north or a NATO country from Belarusian territory, as Moscow seeks to draw Belarus deeper into the war.

item.title: 🛢️🚢 Greek Tanker Crosses Hormuz Amid Gulf Shipping Disruption
item.description: A Greek-operated tanker sailed from the Gulf to India, one of the few crude sailings through the Strait of Hormuz this week as most shipping remains disrupted by the Iran conflict.

item.title: 🇮🇳🇦🇪 India-UAE Sign Strategic Defense Partnership
item.description: India and the UAE agreed on a strategic defence partnership framework as PM Modi visited Abu Dhabi, deepening ties amid the Iran war with agreements on defence and petroleum cooperation.

item.title: 🇺🇸🇮🇶 US Arrests Iraqi Kataib Hezbollah Commander for Plotting Attacks on Jewish Targets
item.description: The US Justice Department arrested Mohammad Baqer Saad Dawood Al-Saadi, an Iraqi national and Kataib Hezbollah commander, for terrorism on behalf of Iran. He allegedly planned attacks against Jewish sites and US interests.

item.title: 🇦🇪🇮🇳 UAE Unveils $5 Billion India Investment Push During Modi Visit
item.description: The UAE signed deals with India related to energy supplies and maritime security during Prime Minister Modi's visit, strengthening ties between the two nations amid the regional conflict.

item.title: 🇭🇰⚠️ IMF Warns Hong Kong Economy of Risks Linked to Middle East War
item.description: The International Monetary Fund praised Hong Kong's resilient economy but warned of risks connected to the Middle East conflict while urging the city to pursue medium-term financial reforms.

item.title: 🇵🇰🇮🇷 Pakistan Secures Release of 31 Seafarers Held by US
item.description: Pakistan announced the successful repatriation of 31 seafarers, including 11 Pakistanis and 20 Iranians, who were aboard vessels seized by the US in a high-seas operation.

item.title: 🌍 BRICS Foreign Ministers Fail to Agree on Joint Statement Over Iran War
item.description: Top diplomats from BRICS nations including rivals Iran and UAE could not issue a joint statement after a two-day meeting in Delhi, exposing deep divisions within the bloc over the ongoing Iran conflict. India released only a chair's statement instead.

item.title: 🇮🇷 Oscar-Winning Iranian Director Condemns War Deaths and Crackdown
item.description: Asghar Farhadi, director of the first Iranian film to win an Oscar for best foreign language movie, described as deeply painful the deaths of thousands in a January crackdown on protesters and the ongoing Iran war.

item.title: 🇹🇼 Trump Weighs Taiwan Arms Package After Summit Aimed at Steadying US-China Ties
item.description: President Donald Trump said he has not decided whether to proceed with a major arms sale to Taiwan, adding to uncertainty about US support for the island following his summit with Xi Jinping in Beijing.

item.title: 🇨🇺 US Justice Department Prepares to Indict Former Cuban President Raul Castro
item.description: The US Justice Department is working to secure criminal charges against former Cuban President Raul Castro related to the 1996 shootdown of humanitarian planes, amid heightened US-Cuba tensions.

item.title: 🇺🇦 Trump Suggests Deadly Russian Strike on Kyiv Could Set Back Ukraine Peace Efforts
item.description: President Donald Trump suggested that a Russian missile strike on a Kyiv apartment building that killed 24 people, including three children, could complicate efforts to find a peaceful settlement to the war in Ukraine.
